title: Mc Cigs
description: Adds cigarettes and all their nasty side effects to minecraft
body:
![MC CIGS : We are not liable for respiratory issues you may develop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91962c77b2c0874bd1933b72ef78d473589fcbc2.png)


# What is this mod
Presenting, Mc Cigs! A mod allowing you to mess with your body even in game! Craft and smoke cigarettes, and in time you too can be the proud owner of respiratory issues. Don't worry though, they'll only affect your breath and make you more exhausted, not like you needed that right?

> The mod is able to be paired with mod menu for an easy configuration experience

## Play in STYLE
Ever thought your minecraft avatar looked too boring? Well we have the solution for you, introducing, putting a cigarette in your mouth!!! With that, everybody will know just how much you care for your little ol' lungs :)
![Girl with a cigarette in her mouth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a9de471f1cc00cff20b3de3a173a0bf4418eaab.png)

 _(does not come with cool sunglasses or a cool skin)_

## Show your allegiance
The people DESERVE to know who you stand with. To help you with that, we've added a new banner pattern that will let you shine and find other smokers like you!

<details>
<summary>The new Cig banner pattern</summary>

![A showcase of the new banner pattern, on the right is a shield that uses it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c372a3015df6fc596d05d095f76fc97c8bfe8cae.png)


 _(We do not guarantee you will keep your non-smoker friends)_

</details>

## Play in survival!
This beautiful package is not just reserved for the creative elitists! You can craft cigarettes and enjoy them from the comfort of your starter house you just built.
<details>
<summary>Crafting recipes</summary>
  
### Cigarettes

You can put the cigarette in your mouth by shift + right-clicking

![Cigarettes crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/375dfd5a7e44788c1c94f2ea2ab2dce5318d018e.png)

### Cigarette Pack

![Cigarette pack recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2df0dca45c902a6df68028d47db1fc000eb87f6f.png)

### Cig Banner Pattern
This one is shapeless

![Cig banner pattern recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b49dec739c5b47119be7e86729b19e7aa9d2ef71.png)

</details>
